Class ProblemInformation

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.nparser.ProblemInformation
public class ProblemInformation extends Object
This POJO represents the static information of a KeY problem. It can be extracted directly via FindProblemInformation, without any previous interpretation of the AST.

This class contains rather the raw information, e.g. classpaths are not completed with current working dir. Rather the values are provided as in the KeyAst.File. Further work may require, like in KeYFile.readJavaPath().

See Also:
